# Amber Marigold

## About

<img width="1392" height="960" alt="Image" src="https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/2f8f08cd-6f45-40c9-8c95-0d0c8ab586c6" />

# Amber Marigold

A warm, cream-and-amber light theme with a corrected surface hierarchy and status colors tuned to stay legible instead of blending into the background.

_Submitted by Arne K. (https://arne.sh)._
